# BP Best Practices Knowledge Base

> Machine-readable knowledge base of proven coding patterns. Before starting new work, load this file, then load the llms.txt for each concern relevant to your task. Load only FOUNDATIONAL entries unless a specific topic is relevant.

## Priority Legend

FOUNDATIONAL = universal patterns every repo should follow -- always load these
RECOMMENDED = strong patterns for matching tech stacks -- load when relevant
OPTIONAL = nice-to-have improvements -- skip unless explicitly asked

## Concerns

### Claude Configuration
- [Claude Config index](practices/claude-config/llms.txt): CLAUDE.md structure, rules, hooks, skills, agents (5 entries)

### Testing
- [Testing index](practices/testing/llms.txt): Vitest, Jest, Playwright, coverage patterns (2 entries)

### Linting & Formatting
- [Linting & Formatting index](practices/linting-formatting/llms.txt): Biome, ESLint, auto-format hooks (2 entries)

### Error Handling
- [Error Handling index](practices/error-handling/llms.txt): Structured logging, error context propagation (1 entry)

### Deployment
- [Deployment index](practices/deployment/llms.txt): Docker multi-stage, Cloudflare, Northflank, Doppler (3 entries)

### Monorepo
- [Monorepo index](practices/monorepo/llms.txt): pnpm + Turborepo, shared packages, workspaces (2 entries)

### Versioning
- [Versioning index](practices/versioning/llms.txt): Semver, changelog enforcement (2 entries)

### Safety
- [Safety index](practices/safety/llms.txt): Read-only-first, permissions gates, PreToolUse hooks (2 entries)

### Documentation
- [Documentation index](practices/documentation/llms.txt): Reference files, plan structure, investigation patterns (2 entries)

### Design Systems
- [Design Systems index](practices/design-systems/llms.txt): OKLCH tokens, guardrails, iframe isolation (1 entry)

### Environment
- [Environment index](practices/environment/llms.txt): Doppler + .env.local, secrets encryption (1 entry)

### Knowledge Bases
- [Knowledge Bases index](practices/knowledge-bases/llms.txt): YAML frontmatter, two-level indexes, ID conventions (1 entry)
